name: clone-alert
description: Minimal PMD CPD-like copy-paste detector for TypeScript, JavaScript and templates.

scripts.lint: npm run check:fix && npm run lint:knip && npm run check-types && npm run lint:cpd
scripts.lint:cpd: npm run build && node dist/cli.js --minimum-tokens 70 --files src --extensions ts --format text --fail-on-violation
